title: API Traction Improvement
description: Analyze the client's current technical setup and identify specific areas where our expertise in API integrations, data processing pipelines, and custom scripts can help improve visibility and usage.
deliverable: A detailed report outlining potential solutions to increase traction for the API
verification_notes: The code provides a good structure for the report but lacks the crucial content required to satisfy the requirements. More focus should be put into analyzing the client's current technical setup and identifying areas where our expertise can make an impact. Issues: The code is missing a description of potential solutions in the report class., There is no analysis on where API integrations, data processing pipelines and custom scripts can help improve visibility and usage.

title: Browser Internal Audio Isolation
description: Analyze browser mechanisms for isolating internal audio from microphone input. Provide a technical explanation and potential guidance on implementing similar functionality.
deliverable: A markdown document explaining the analysis and insights gained

title: API Performance Analysis and Optimization
description: Analyze the client's SaaS API performance, identify bottlenecks, and suggest optimization strategies to improve user acquisition and retention. Include A/B testing of different pricing tiers and integration with popular productivity tools.
deliverable: Report detailing API performance analysis and suggested optimizations

title: Internal Audio Isolation Extension
description: Design and implement a custom browser extension that isolates internal audio from microphone input, utilizing API integrations to address complex technical problems.
deliverable: Custom browser extension code with API integration documentation
